query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of flowing water over smooth river stones, with a large textured rock occupying the right foreground. The water appears as soft white ribbons moving across brown and amber wet stones visible beneath the surface. Warm directional light grazes the rock face revealing mineral striations and patches of dried sediment.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up view of flowing water rendered as soft white ribbons through deliberate motion blur, streaking over smooth brown and amber river stones. A large textured rock occupies the right foreground, its surface showing mineral striations and dried sediment patches under warm directional light. The intentional softening transforms the water into dreamlike, flowing shapes that obscure individual droplets and ripples in favor of ethereal movement.
